name: Peanut Blossoms
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Reese's Peanut Butter (Creamy or Crunchy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Remove wrappers from chocolate pieces.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat shortening and peanut butter until well blended.
4. Gradually add 1/3 cup granulated sugar and brown sugar; beat until light and fluffy.
5. Add egg, milk, and vanilla; beat well.
6. Stir together flour, baking soda, and salt; gradually add to peanut butter mixture.
7. Shape dough into 1-inch balls.
8. Roll each ball in granulated sugar.
9. Place the sugar-coated dough on an ungreased cookie sheet.
10. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
11. Immediately place a Hershey's Kiss on top of each cookie, pressing down so it cracks around the edges.
12. Remove cookies from the baking sheet and transfer them to a wire rack.
13. Allow cookies to cool completely.
About 4 dozen cookies are produced.
